sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22129" key="ghpone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γη-πονέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γη-πονία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γη-πονικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γη-πόνος</orth>, <sense id="n22129.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γεωπ-</ref></xr>, qq. <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> </sense> </entryFree>
